smash-ultimate-api.title: Unofficial Super Smash Bros. Ultimate RESTful API
bulletPoints: Used web scraping to obtain data from the Smash Wiki and covert it to JSON.
Created endpoints to allow retrieval of the data obtained.
Wrote unit tests with Pytest, reaching 100% of code coverage.
Set up a GitHub Actions workflow to run the test suite on every push.
Served static assets using Cloudflare R2 object storage.
Deployed the API on Vercel.

switchbot.title: SwitchBot™: A Discord Bot
bulletPoints: Developed a Discord bot for me and my friends using Python and Discord.py.
Used Firestore as the database for some commands, such as the one that creates stickers (figurinhas).
Containerized the bot using Docker.
Self-hosted the bot on a home Ubuntu server.

habitat-website.title: Corporate Website of Habitat Arquitetura & Construção
bulletPoints: Rebuilt, in 3 months and using Django, the company's corporate website that was previously made in WordPress.
Set up an administrator panel that interacts with the MySQL database to allow the website's mantainer to update its contents with ease.
Remade and modernized the website's design, making prototypes in Figma and implementing them with Bootstrap.

easytalk.title: EasyTalk: Therapy Web App
bulletPoints: Design the app's entity-relationship model and implemented it in Django.
Developed the features of search/filtering of professionals and appointment scheduling.
Wrote unit tests that found edge cases and bugs which had not been discovered before.
Prototyped the UI in Figma and built it using Bootstrap.
Received a 10/10 grade after presenting EasyTalk as the capstone project for the Systems Analysis and Development degree.

picross.title: Picross Replica in Python
bulletPoints: Recreated the Picross game with Python and Pygame applying object-oriented concepts.

fatec.title: Systems Analysis and Development
bulletPoints: I elaborated the entity-relationship model of the system and implemented it in Django.
I implemented the functions for searching professionals and scheduling consultations.
I wrote unit tests that found edge cases and bugs that had not been considered before.
I prototyped the interface in Figma and built it using Bootstrap.
I received a perfect grade after presenting the work to the evaluation committee.

high-school.title: American High School
bulletPoints: Served as a co-teacher in the Computers subject, teaching classes on Google Workspace and creating related activities for my classmates.

Completed 60 hours of community service through various activities, including bringing fun to the kids at the children's community center of Cassia Lasca, designing promotional artwork for support campaigns, and helping classmates study for exams.
Wrote 3 play scripts performed by my classmates to the kids at the Cassia Lasca community center.
extraParagraphs: The High School program is offered by Griggs International Academy and allows students to earn an international high school diploma in addition to the national one.

During my three years in regular Brazilian high school, I took extra classes in the afternoon as part of this program. All classes were taught entirely in English and covered subjects such as Computers, American and British Literature, American Government, American History, Health, and Fine Art.
It was a great opportunity to become fully immersed in the English language and improve my proficiency.

ensino-medio.title: Brazilian High School
bulletPoints: I elaborated the entity-relationship model of the system and implemented it in Django.
I implemented the functions for searching professionals and scheduling consultations.
I wrote unit tests that found edge cases and bugs that had not been considered before.
I prototyped the interface in Figma and built it using Bootstrap.
I received a perfect grade after presenting the work to the evaluation committee.

best-academic-performance.name: Best Academic Performance
best-academic-performance.description: Recognized as the best-performing student among my classmates in the Systems Analysis and Development course at Fatec Campinas.

10-10-capstone-project.name: 10/10 Capstone Project
10-10-capstone-project.description: Received a 10/10 grade after presenting EasyTalk, the online therapy web app, as my capstone project.

s.name: 10/10 Capstone Project
s.description: Received a 10/10 grade for outstanding academic performance in the capstone project.
